title: Subscriptions
description: Subscription operations panel. New subscriptions normally come from the Orvae checkout; here you can adjust dates, change plan, extend trial, cancel, or create manual subscriptions for support and migration.
search_placeholder: Search by tenant, slug, RUC, plan…

renewal_send.title: Send renewal link
renewal_send.description: A WhatsApp message with the Orvae payment link will be sent to {{name}}.
renewal_send.hint: Ignores reminder-day rules and advance payments. Use when the clinic asks for the link or the plan has already expired.

renewal_preview.title: Renewal reminder preview
renewal_preview.description: Message {{name}} would receive on WhatsApp if a reminder were sent today.
renewal_preview.would_send: This message WOULD be sent automatically today.

form.description_create: Manually create a subscription. Useful for VIP customers, migrations, or wire-transfer payments. A tenant can only have one active subscription at a time.
form.description_edit: Adjust data of an existing subscription. For state transitions (extend trial, change plan, cancel) use the row action menu.
form.section_contract_hint: Tenant, plan, status and economic terms.
form.section_dates_hint: Lifecycle dates. Use the ⏰ button for the date picker.
form.section_cancellation_hint: Cancellation details (only visible when status is Cancelled).

fields.tenant_id_hint: Customer the subscription is attached to. Cannot be changed afterwards.
fields.precio_pactado_hint: Amount the customer pays each cycle. Auto-filled when selecting a plan.

extend-trial.title: Extend trial period
extend-trial.description: You're about to add N days to {{tenant}}'s trial period. If the subscription was not in trial, it will be moved to 'In trial'.
extend-trial.days_hint: Between 1 and 365. Added to the current trial end date (or today if it already expired).

change-plan.title: Change plan
change-plan.description: You're about to change {{tenant}}'s plan. The negotiated price will be recalculated with the new plan's price unless you specify otherwise.
change-plan.keep_price_hint: Useful when the customer has a negotiated price you want to preserve.

cancel.title: Cancel subscription
cancel.description: You're about to cancel {{tenant}}'s subscription. The row is kept (not deleted) to preserve billing history. You can delete it later if you wish.
cancel.reason_placeholder: Migrated to another system · Business closure · …
cancel.reason_hint: Minimum {{min}} characters. This reason is stored for audit.

delete.title: Delete subscription
delete.description: You're about to permanently delete {{tenant}}'s subscription. This action is irreversible.
delete.not_cancelled: Only cancelled subscriptions can be deleted. Cancel the subscription first, then you can delete it.

bulk.delete_description_one: 1 subscription will be deleted. Only cancelled ones are deleted; the rest are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description_other: {{count}} subscriptions will be deleted. Only cancelled ones are deleted; the rest are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description: {{count}} subscriptions will be deleted. Only cancelled ones are deleted.

empty.no_records_description: Subscriptions show up here when a customer subscribes from Orvae. You can also create one manually for support or migration.
empty.no_results_description: Adjust filters or search to see more subscriptions.

toast.load_error: We couldn't load the subscriptions. Retry in a few seconds.
